old_column.content: import { ensure, isFunction, isString, toArray, warn } from "@zag-js/utils"

new_column.content: import { ensure, isFunction, isString, toArray, warn } from "@zag-js/utils"

old_column.content: const { id, ids, getRootNode } = userProps as any

new_column.content: const { id, ids, getRootNode } = userProps as any

old_column.content: const props: any = machine.props?.({ props: userProps, scope }) ?? userProps

new_column.content: const props: any = machine.props?.({ props: userProps, scope }) ?? userProps

old_column.content: const refs: BindableRefs<T> = useRefs(machine.refs?.({ prop, context: ctx }) ?? {})

new_column.content: const refs: BindableRefs<T> = useRefs(machine.refs?.({ prop, context: ctx }) ?? {})

old_column.content: if (!fn) warn(`[zag-js] No implementation found for action "${JSON.stringify(s)}"`)

new_column.content: if (!fn) warn(`[zag-js] No implementation found for action "${JSON.stringify(s)}"`)

old_column.content: if (!fn) warn(`[zag-js] No implementation found for effect "${JSON.stringify(s)}"`)

new_column.content: if (!fn) warn(`[zag-js] No implementation found for effect "${JSON.stringify(s)}"`)

old_column.content: ensure(machine.computed, `[zag-js] No computed object found on machine`)

new_column.content: ensure(machine.computed, () => `[zag-js] No computed object found on machine`)

old_column.content: return function get<K extends keyof T>(key: K): T[K] {

new_column.content: return function get<K extends keyof T>(key: K): T[K] {
